"CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-835", "name": "Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop')"}], "description": "### Impact

An attacker who uses this vulnerability can craft a PDF which leads to an infinite loop. This requires merging a file with threads/articles into a writer.

### Patches

This has been fixed in [pypdf==6.13.1](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.13.1).

### Workarounds

If users cannot upgrade yet, consider applying the changes from PR [#3839](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3839).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00111, "percentile": 0.01588}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-g9xf-7f8q-9mcj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-09T21:09:53Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g9xf-7f8q-9mcj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-g9xf-7f8q-9mcj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54651"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-22T21:16:25Z", "published_at": "2026-07-09T21:09:53Z", "references": ["https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/security/advisories/GHSA-g9xf-7f8q-9mcj", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54651", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3839", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.13.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g9xf-7f8q-9mcj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/py-pdf/pypdf/security-advisories/GHSA-g9xf-7f8q-9mcj", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf", "summary": "pypdf: Possible infinite loop when processing threads/articles in writer", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T21:09:54Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-g9xf-7f8q-9mcj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.13.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pypdf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.13.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pypdf: Possible infinite loop when processing threads/articles in writer
